Typically, organizations like Cold Outreach for backlinks is going to be really challenging, especially if have a site with a moderate or sort of low domain authority, because there's just not going to be a lot of advantage in other sites giving you a link or, like, linking to your content.
So what sites typically do when they're trying to build backlink authority is find a service that...
Basically pays a platform who has like set partners that are okay with like sharing or not sharing backlinks but like adding links to other companies and their content.
And so it becomes an exchange as a paid service.
That way there's a perk for everybody involved, which is essentially the service that we offer.
And right now, so our recommendation would be like five backlinks per month, which the way our service operates is priced at $3,000 a month for that.

We have a whole library of prompts that, it's the cool thing about this, a lot of times in those AI visibility tools, when you add a new prompt, you're one, you're just guessing at like the prompt that makes the most sense to try and track for your company.
And it usually takes a couple of months to get any data around that prompt because it takes time for the tools to go and like scrape all the different responses and really start to see patterns.
So what the shared library does is it gives you an instant view into these prompts because we're already tracking them across a whole variety of different industries.
And then we can tailor it.
